adjective_forms: selbe, selber, selbes (declined like definite article; no comparative/superlative)
notes: Always used with a definite article or demonstrative pronoun; never used predicatively. It emphasizes identity/sameness. Closely related to 'derselbe/dieselbe/dasselbe' (written as one word). 'Selbe' alone is the inflected stem form, e.g. 'der selbe Mann' or more commonly 'derselbe Mann'.

sentences.english: We live on the same street.

sentences.german: Er macht jeden Tag denselben Fehler.
sentences.english: He makes the same mistake every day.
